statement: In every magma, Equation 665 (`x = x * (y * ((z * w) * u))`) implies Equation 4600 (`(x * x) * y = (x * y) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0973
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op x (op y (op (op z w) u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op (op x x) y) = (op (op x y) z)
